com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface IRegUserInfo

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    RegUserInfo

    public interface IRegUserInfo
    Interface of the description of a central server administrator or a server cluster administrator

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getDescr()
      Gets the description of the central server administrator or server cluster administrator
      String getName()
      Gets the name of the central server administrator or server cluster administrator
      String getPassword()
      Gets the administrator password
      String getSysUserName()
      Gets the operating system user name of the server cluster administrator
      boolean isPasswordAuthAllowed()
      Gets the flag that shows whether password authentication is allowed for the administrator
      boolean isSysAuthAllowed()
      Gets the flag that shows whether operating system authentication is allowed for the administrator
      void setDescr(String descr)
      Sets the description of the central server administrator or server cluster administrator
      void setName(String name)
      Sets the name of the central server administrator or server cluster administrator
      void setPassword(String pwd)
      Sets the administrator password
      void setPasswordAuthAllowed(boolean value)
      Sets the flag that shows whether password authentication is allowed for the administrator
      void setSysAuthAllowed(boolean value)
      Sets the flag that shows whether operating system authentication is allowed for the administrator
      void setSysUserName(String name)
      Sets the operating system user name of the server cluster administrator

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        String getName()
        Gets the name of the central server administrator or server cluster administrator
        Returns:
        administrator name

      • setName

        void setName(String name)
        Sets the name of the central server administrator or server cluster administrator
        Parameters:
        name - administrator name

      • getDescr

        String getDescr()
        Gets the description of the central server administrator or server cluster administrator
        Returns:
        description

      • setDescr

        void setDescr(String descr)
        Sets the description of the central server administrator or server cluster administrator
        Parameters:
        descr - description

      • getPassword

        String getPassword()
        Gets the administrator password
        Returns:
        password

      • setPassword

        void setPassword(String pwd)
        Sets the administrator password
        Parameters:
        pwd - password

      • isPasswordAuthAllowed

        boolean isPasswordAuthAllowed()
        Gets the flag that shows whether password authentication is allowed for the administrator
        Returns:
        true - if password authentication is allowed,
        otherwise - false

      • setPasswordAuthAllowed

        void setPasswordAuthAllowed(boolean value)
        Sets the flag that shows whether password authentication is allowed for the administrator
        Parameters:
        value - flag that shows whether password authentication is allowed for the administrator (true - if password authentication is allowed, otherwise - false)

      • isSysAuthAllowed

        boolean isSysAuthAllowed()
        Gets the flag that shows whether operating system authentication is allowed for the administrator
        Returns:
        true - operating system authentication is allowed,
        otherwise - false

      • setSysAuthAllowed

        void setSysAuthAllowed(boolean value)
        Sets the flag that shows whether operating system authentication is allowed for the administrator
        Parameters:
        value - flag that shows whether operating system authentication is allowed for the administrator (true - if operating system authentication is allowed, otherwise - false)

      • getSysUserName

        String getSysUserName()
        Gets the operating system user name of the server cluster administrator
        Returns:
        operating system user name

      • setSysUserName

        void setSysUserName(String name)
        Sets the operating system user name of the server cluster administrator
        Parameters:
        name - operating system user name
